reviews.comment:
Es el lugar donde los que conocemos San Clemente elegimos para cargar nafta.
Son muy amables, los precios mas bajos y aceptan varios medios de pago

(Translated by Google)
It's the place where those of us who know San Clemente choose to fill up our gas tanks.
They're very friendly, the prices are the lowest, and they accept various forms of payment.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y las veces que fui siempre funcionaba la App ( y pude acceder a todos los descuentos) lo cual en ruta no es habitual. La atención rápida y ordenada

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and the app always worked every time I went (so I could access all the discounts), which isn't always the case when traveling. The service was quick and efficient.
